$comment: Template for .gemini/settings.json emitted to Gemini-aware USE templates (kailash-coc-py, kailash-coc-rs). Merged with repo-local overrides by coc-sync at Step 5-equivalent. Event names are Gemini-native (BeforeTool/AfterTool) — NOT CC's PreToolUse/PostToolUse.

codex-mcp-guard.$comment: The MCP guard server wraps mutating tools (apply_patch, shell, etc.) with POLICIES-table enforcement. Same server as Codex consumes; Gemini invokes it via native MCP.

$hook_event_translation_note: CC → Gemini: PreToolUse → BeforeTool, PostToolUse → AfterTool, Stop → SessionEnd. See .claude/agents/gemini-architect.md § Hook Event Name Translation.
